ValidationRule.description: #DimensionStory - Should not allow the user to create Bank Account as Lease Dimension
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(!$Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Disable_All_Triggers__c , leaseworks__Dimension__r.Name == 'Bank Account' , (OR( AND (NOT(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payment__c)) , OR(ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Payment__r.leaseworks__Payment_Type__c, 'CN_Payment'), ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Payment__r.leaseworks__Payment_Type__c,'Credit Memo Correction'))), AND(IF( NOT(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Invoice__c)) , 'Invoice', IF(NOT(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payment__c)) , 'Payment', IF( NOT(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payable__c)) , 'Payable', IF( NOT(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Credit_Memo__c)) , 'Credit Memo' , IF( NOT(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payouts__c)) , 'Payout' , IF( NOT(ISBLANK( leaseworks__LOC_Transactions__c )) , 'LoC DrawDown' , IF( NOT(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payment_on_Account__c)) , 'Payment On Account' , '' )))))))== 'Payable', leaseworks__Payable__r.leaseworks__Lease__c == NULL) )) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not allowed to create Bank Account
